title: Redstone Electronics
description: A mod that adds electronics-inspired redstone blocks to Minecraft.
body:
Currently, the added components are:
-Redstone Resistors
-Redstone Rotary Selector
-Redstone Rotary Distributor
-Stick (Block form)
More will be added in the future.
IMPORTANT: Prior to version 0.2.0, the project was All Rights Reserved.
Only 0.2.0 and later, which is currently an Alpha release, is licensed under the GNU LGPL v3 or later license. Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/redstone-electronics "Redstone Electronics CurseForge").
